title: 10-hour water cut for Kotte from Saturday (25) night to Sunday (26) morning
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); The supply of water for multiple areas in Kotte, and Nugegoda will be suspended for 10-hours from Saturday (25) night to Sunday (26) morning.

The areas that will be affected are: Ethul Kotte, Pita Kotte, Beddagana, Mirihana, Madiwela, Thalapathpitiya, Udahamulla, Embuldeniya, Nugegoda, Pagoda, from Wijerama junction upto 7th Mile Post junction in Highlevel road and all connected by roads, from Nugegoda junction upto Open University in Nawala
The water cut will be in effect from 10 PM on Saturday (25) to 8 AM on Sunday (26).
10-hour water cut for Kotte from Saturday (25) night to Sunday (26) morning
